scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pokemon-platform/shared && npm run build --workspace @pokemon-platform/data && npm run build --workspace @pokemon-platform/engine && npm run build --workspace @pokemon-platform/server && npm run build --workspace @pokemon-platform/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @pokemon-platform/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @pokemon-platform/data && npm run typecheck --workspace @pokemon-platform/engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @pokemon-platform/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @pokemon-platform/client
